migrateUnique.title: Migrate to ArchiMate-Only
migrateUnique.description: Remove all standard Turbo EA card types, cards, and relations, keeping only ArchiMate elements.
migrateUnique.confirm: This will permanently delete all non-ArchiMate data including card types, cards, and relations. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
migrateUnique.success: Migration complete: {{cards}} cards, {{relations}} relations, {{types}} card types, {{rt}} relation types removed.
migrateUnique.disabled: Standard types are hidden. Re-enable ArchiMate and refresh to make the migration available.

missingRelation.title: Créer le type de relation manquant
